_doc: Scalar value of an existing waveform output at x-coordinate X. Generic helper for PN spot values (value(phaseNoise 1000)), DFT-trace sampling, transfer-function probes, etc. X is interpreted on the waveform's native x-axis (frequency for spectra, time for transient).
name: value_at

params.doc: X-axis point (Hz, s, etc.) — depends on the upstream output's axis.
